name: analyze_project_structure
summary: Analyze the directory structure and file types of a software project to understand its organization.
description: Identifies key directories, file patterns, and language usage in a project's source tree.

path.description: Relative sandbox path to the project directory, e.g., src, app, or .

summary.description: A concise summary of the project structure and key findings.

file_types.description: A breakdown of file types by extension (e.g., {".py": 5, ".js": 3}).

directories.description: List of directories found in the project path.

preconditions: path must exist and be accessible
